return(function(...)local P,g do local j,Q,O,G,Z=math.floor,string.char,string.byte,tonumber,string.sub local function a(P,g)local Q=0 for O=0,7,1 do local G=P/2+g/2 if G~=j(G)then Q=Q+2^O end P=j(P/2)g=j(g/2)end return Q end local U,B="iiihhhiiiiihssss","\168\240\235\171\160\186\213\221\249\249\255\172\019\225\179\198\195\212\005\031\000\000\001\000\000\001\a\000\000\000__index\006\000\000\000__call\005\000\000\000__mod\005\000\000\000__mul"local s=65 local k=2529 local f=false local function l(P)local l={}for g=1,#P,2 do local j=Z(P,g,g+1)l[#l+1]=G(j,16)end local H={}for P=0,3,1 do local g=l[P+1]local j=((g-k)+256)%256 local Q=O(U,P%16+1)local G=O(B,P%s+1)H[P+1]=a(a(j,Q),G)end local y=((H[1]+H[2]*256)+H[3]*65536)+H[4]*16777216 local F={}for P=1,y,1 do local g=l[P+4]if f and P%2==0 then g=(g%16)*16+j(g/16)end local G=((g-k)+256)%256 local Z=(P-1)%16+1 local H=(P-1)%s+1 local y=O(U,Z)local o=O(B,H)F[P]=Q(a(a(G,y),o))end return table.concat(F)end local
